headline: Who Is Jordan Fish, Alias Cobie? The Echo Founder Now Leading Coinbase’s Base App
summary: This week saw one of the biggest leadership transitions in crypto and web3 happening. Cobie, a name that rarely dominates headlines despite being one of crypto’s most well-connected figures, suddenly found himself back in the spotlight after Base creator Jesse Pollak announced he was handing over the reins of the Base App to him. Better

headline: Shares of crypto-linked companies are trading higher amid a rise in Bitcoin after weaker-than-expected June inflation data reduced expectations that the Federal Reserve would hike interest rates this year. The prospect of a less restrictive monetary policy may support demand for risk assets.

headline: Coinbase (COIN) Stock May Stay Expensive On CLARITY Act Debate
summary: Coinbase Global’s stock has given up a large share of its recent gains, with the price down about 58% over the past year, while the broader valuation checks still flag the shares as expensive rather than a clear bargain. A roughly 58% decline over 1 year has reset expectations for Coinbase Global, raising the question of whether recent weakness has fully adjusted the price to current fundamentals. On the one hand, progress on regulatory frameworks like the CLARITY Act and new product...
